response.justification: The candidate brings roughly 17 years of broad, polyglot engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, which nominally satisfies the tenure floor. However, the career arc is firmly that of a hands-on senior developer, not a director-level technical strategist. There is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no recognized AI expertise (publications, prominent AI platforms, or enterprise advisory history), and no track record of influencing cloud or AI strategy at organizational or customer scale. The recent MCP/agentic tooling work at re:cinq is directionally relevant but far too nascent to substitute for the depth of AI platform leadership and strategic advisory capability this role requires.
strengths: Genuine entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective open-source geo-data platform, demonstrating ability to build and ship independently
Broad polyglot engineering depth across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure over ~17 years
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq signals emerging awareness of the AI tooling space
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no recognized AI expertise — a strongly preferred qualification for this role
Career trajectory is senior individual contributor; no evidence of director-level leadership, strategic customer advisory, or cross-organizational technical influence
No demonstrated cloud platform strategy experience or history shaping enterprise AI/cloud adoption at scale
